allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
docs: update P2_TASKS_TODO.md with completion status

Mark all core P2 tasks as completed:

**Completed Tasks**:
- P2.1: Deleted 4 unused Helper classes (194 lines)
- P2.2: Enhanced EnumHelper with 4 new methods
- P2.3: Fixed all XML documentation warnings
- P2.4: Fixed CA2200, CS0162, CS8603, ASP0019 warnings
- P2.5: Completed security audit (ShellHelper, RSAHelper, HtmlHelper)
- P2.6: HttpHelper socket exhaustion review and improvements

**Warning Statistics**:
- Framework Core: 14+ → 0 warnings
- RBAC Domain: Multiple → 0 warnings

Update document to v2.0, add execution summary section.

Remaining tasks moved to P3:
- TreeHelper, IpHelper, AssemblyHelper analysis
- EncryPasswordValueObject migration
- Performance optimization

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(Select-String -Pattern "warning CS|warning CA|warning IDE|warning NU|warning SYSLIB")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content build_baseline.txt; $allLines = $content.Count; $ideWarnings = \($content | Select-String "warning IDE"\).Count; $errors = \($content | Select-String "Error" | Where-Object { $_ -match "error " }\).Count; $nuWarnings = \($content | Select-String "warning NU"\).Count; Write-Output "Total lines: $allLines"; Write-Output "IDE Warnings: $ideWarnings"; Write-Output "Build Errors: $errors"; Write-Output "NU Warnings: $nuWarnings")
